prompt.imageDetailContent: Please generate an image: the subject is..., the style is..., the aspect ratio is..., details include...
prompt.ttsPolishContent: Please rewrite the following text for voice broadcast, make it natural, clear and rhythmic:
prompt.reasoningContent: Please analyze this step by step, list assumptions first, then conclusions and risks:
prompt.draftContentPlaceholder: Template content, can use variables like {topic}, {style}

home.welcomeTitle: Models, assets, logs, and workflows in one workspace.
home.welcomeDesc: MiniMax handles images and voice, DeepSeek handles reasoning. Access history, favorites, diagnostics from the left.

chat.minimaxEmptyDesc: Red Channel: For images, voice, and media
chat.deepseekEmptyDesc: Blue Channel: DeepSeek API, token billing

history.minimaxImageDesc: All image history generated via MiniMax.

tasks.title: Task Queue
tasks.desc: Track async tasks like chat and TTS.
tasks.empty: No tasks, Q&A and TTS will appear here

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.desc: View task results, settings and exports feedback.

settings.title: Model Settings
settings.desc: Configure API Keys and select models.
settings.emptyKey: Leave blank to keep current key
settings.deepseekHint: DeepSeek models load from /models using Key, fallback to default.

logs.title: Logs
logs.desc: View runtime logs, filter by level and keywords.

speech.title: Speech Synthesis
speech.desc: MiniMax TTS channel, supports preview, speed, vol, pitch, format.
speech.exShort1Text: Hello, welcome to the Weizhi Agent intelligent assistant!
speech.exShort2Text: System detected sufficient API balance, please enjoy your experience.
speech.exShort3Text: Tomorrow will be sunny and clear with temperatures from 22 to 28 degrees.
speech.exShort4Text: Please note, your task has been completed successfully.
speech.exShort5Text: Hello, for quality assurance purposes, this call may be recorded. Thank you for your understanding.
speech.exShort6Text: Turn right at the next intersection, then merge onto the main road and continue for two kilometers.
speech.exShort7Text: Turning on the living room air conditioner and setting the temperature to a comfortable 26 degrees.
speech.exShort8Text: Hello, you have a weekly department meeting starting in ten minutes. Please attend on time.
speech.exLong1Text: Weizhi Agent is a multi-modal AI collaborative workbench built for creative professionals. It seamlessly integrates MiniMax image generation, speech synthesis, and DeepSeek reasoning models, enabling you to finish copy polishing, voiceover generation, visual design, and logical analysis in a single workspace.
speech.exLong2Text: In today's fast-evolving AI landscape, how to design technology to better serve daily workflows and creative output is a question for every developer. We translate cold APIs into vibrant productivity tools through glassmorphic visual designs and smooth interactive animations.
speech.exLong3Text: Once upon a time, in a quiet forest far away from the noisy world, lived a clever little squirrel. It not only collected pinecones but also wondered about the outside world. Whenever night fell and stars shined, it would sit on the highest branch, listening to the wind and dreaming of a grand adventure.
speech.exLong4Text: Good morning, everyone. Welcome to the Morning Tech News. Our top story today: the artificial intelligence industry has achieved another major technological breakthrough. A new generation of large-scale language models has made significant progress in reasoning speed and multi-modal interaction. Industry experts predict this will trigger a new wave of efficiency revolutions in key areas such as autonomous driving and automated design.
speech.exLong5Text: At every corner of life, there are beautiful moments waiting for you to discover. The all-new smart coffee machine, featuring a precise temperature control system and professional pressure extraction technology, brings the flavors of specialty coffee beans from around the world to your cup with just one click. The first ray of morning light, accompanied by the rich aroma of coffee, starts your day with energy. This is not just a cup of coffee, but an exquisite attitude towards life.
speech.exLong6Text: Now, gently close your eyes and let your body fully relax. Take a deep breath in, feeling the fresh air fill your lungs. Then, slowly breathe out, releasing all the fatigue and tension from your body. Maintain this steady breathing and focus your attention on your breath. With each inhalation, you feel calmer; with each exhalation, you feel lighter. Very good, now let us continue to maintain this peaceful state.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.desc: Store important replies, images, and voice.
favorites.empty: No favorites, add from chat or assets

exports.desc: Export chat, media index, logs, favorites, and templates.
